raw_output_payload.reasoning:
Need bash command. Use find /system -type f -printf '%T@ %p
' | sort -nr | head -n1. Or use -printf '%T@ %p
' then cut. Simpler: find /system -type f -printf '%T@ %p
' | sort -nr | head -n1 | cut -d' ' -f2- . Provide one line.
